data.body:
=== SESSION SUMMARY: plan-review gate — experiments, criteria refinement, decomposition, validation ===

This session took the plan-review-gate design (brainstormed in session log 63cc-ec94-4792-464b) from design-of-record
to a grounded, decomposed, externally-reviewed, and validated criteria set. Epic: 5fd2-a7c2-0aec-48fa (authoritative
spec + the full 35-criterion registry). All experiment writeups + data live under docs/experiments/ (committed).

WHAT HAPPENED (rounds):
- R1 chunking/budget grounding (919 runs): batching doesn't drop criteria; cost falls with chunk size; default ~4/turn.
- R2 Opus-vs-Sonnet + intentional grouping (460): Opus flat in N (handles ~12/turn); coherent grouping ~triples
  Sonnet's reliable criteria-per-turn; one Opus pass ~ cost-competitive with reliable Sonnet.
- R3 criteria storage + exec-tier chunking + agentic tier (incl. caching): EXEC TIER (DET/1-TURN/2-STEP/AGENT) is the
  primary axis, not chunk size; agentic criteria are ~85x and unchunkable; with caching, chunk-size cost gap
  collapses -> chunk for reliability. Facet-tagged storage + generic chunker; model x ticket-size chunk formula.
- Decomposed epic 5fd2 into 9 child stories (registry/orchestrator -> {L1, L2, overlays, chunking}; attestation ->
  claim -> docs; sidecar).
- R4 full-suite review of epic+children + DSO sample + overlay triggering + DSO PIL signal-loss: gate over-fired on
  mid-level stories/mechanical tasks -> PROPORTIONATE SCRUTINY re-tune by ticket LEVEL+TYPE (applies_at). Overlay
  triggering validated (T1/T5a/T5d deterministic; T8/T6/T5b/T5c/T9 LLM-routed). NOT losing signal vs DSO (our T8
  probe recovers DSO's structural gaps; we drop forced-scoring noise).
- RECONCILIATION: caught that round-4 "EXP" was the design's existing T2 empirical-probe (reinvented after being
  dropped from the round-1 subset). Restored T2/T3/T4/T5d/COH; built check_registry_coverage.py (fails loudly on any
  omission) so subsetting can't silently drop a criterion again. Root cause: no canonical registry + an over-applied
  "Layer-2 only" scope cut never reverted.
- Relocated all probe artifacts to a clearly-labeled docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/ (harnesses/runs/criteria) +
  README (not tests, not prod). Added the full authoritative criteria list to the epic description.
- R5 coverage/gaps (5 xhigh subagents: Google PSE, Principal-SWE gap audit, cited 2025-26 LLM-plan failure-mode
  research, broad critical review, DSO decider extraction): added 4 distinct criteria — G6 approach-soundness/
  anti-patterns/alternative-selection (the top gap: a well-formed plan can still propose a wrong design; maps to
  DSO's approach-decision-maker), T10 infrastructure/IaC, T11 data-migration safety, T12 rollout/rollback — + 8
  roll-ins (A1 7-anti-patterns, T9 concurrency, T5a cost, T5b observability, T5c least-priv, E5 change-detector, T4
  rollback-remedy, G5 sequencing). criteria_v6.json = complete 31-descriptor LLM registry. Designed the
  alternatives-WITHOUT-negative-priming approach (reviewer generates+discards alternatives; only the chosen approach
  + positive rationale reach the implementer — validated by DSO's architecture). The critical review's findings map
  to COH (dropped) and G6 (added) — self-validating. Confirmed the two "open design questions" were SETTLED in the
  brainstorm (not open) and corrected the epic.
- VALIDATION (gold set on real DSO plans, 240 runs): recall 13/15 + zero rubber-stamping; new overlays cleanly
  PASS-N/A (zero false-fire); new judgment G6/COH/A1 never false-FAIL; E5 OVER-FIRES (9/12) = the tuning target;
  agentic grounding resolves the AMBIGUOUS-on-clean hedge.

TICKET STATE: epic 5fd2 (open) = authoritative spec + 35-criterion registry + grounded defaults + design-decisions
+ a STATUS comment (validation results + remaining work). 9 child stories (open, with deps). Brainstorm design log =
63cc. F1-F12 follow-on register NOT yet filed as tickets (still prose in the epic).

REMAINING TO FINALIZE (before implementation): (1) retune E5 (9/12 over-fire); (2) route the codebase-grounded
criteria + T3 to the AGENT tier; (3) run E4 generalization on a NON-DSO corpus (all validation so far used DSO data,
the same population the routing was tuned on — the key must-have); (4) lift prose sub-checks into structured
checklist[]; (5) harden structured-output parse. THEN file F1-F12 + implement per the 9 children (registry first).

KEY ARTIFACTS: docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/criteria/criteria_v6.json (the set) + check_registry_coverage.py
(guard) + dso-criteria-specs.md (DSO-grounded checklists); reports docs/experiments/plan-review-*.md +
criteria-registry-reconciliation.md + plan-review-validation-{experiment-plan,scorecard}.md. CONSTRAINTS: DSO
(~/digital-service-orchestra) is READ-ONLY sample data; reviewer != plan-author; the gate serves a diverse client
base (polyglot, fail-open). The blocking-on-claim + signature-semantics design decisions are SETTLED — do not reopen.
